wrangler_env.description: Wrangler environment such as production or staging. Empty uses wrangler's default environment.

abort_endpoint.description: Worker route to POST for graceful shutdown. Empty disables imperative abort.

name.description: Outfit name (explicit form). Mutually exclusive with bundle.

cut.description: Outfit cut (explicit form). Mutually exclusive with bundle.

accessories.description: Outfit accessories (explicit form). Empty list by default. Mutually exclusive with bundle.

spec_version.description: Wire contract version. Omit to default to v1; any other value fails validation.

description.description: Free-form operator notes. Not consumed by dispatcher or backends.

session.description: Sesh session label and 5th subject token. Defaults to Name when omitted.

cwd.description: Worker working directory. Empty defers to dispatcher resolution (current dir / --project / sesh worker-cwd).

owner.description: Operator handle used in subject tokens and registry filters. Defaults to $USER.

labels.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata surfaced in $SRV.INFO. Empty by default; otherwise inert.

outfit.description: Suit-prepare bundle. Omit to skip outfit application.

env.description: Env vars passed to the worker. Keys must match [A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*. Empty by default.

tmux.description: Local tmux executor block. Set exactly one of tmux / cf-worker / cf-durable-object.

cf-worker.description: Cloudflare Worker executor block. Set exactly one of tmux / cf-worker / cf-durable-object.

cf-durable-object.description: Cloudflare Durable Object executor block. Set exactly one of tmux / cf-worker / cf-durable-object.

headless.description: Detach into the orch-headless session instead of splitting the current pane. Defaults to false.

verify.description: Poll the new pane for an agent banner before declaring success. Defaults to false.

layout.description: Layout-orchestrator preset (default|grid|full). Empty defers to orch's default split behavior.

position.description: Split direction off the current pane (right|left|above|below). Defaults to right.

role.description: Pane role tag (worker|observer). Empty defers to orch-spawn auto-detect.

no_shim.description: Disable the orch-agent-shim sidecar. Defaults to false (shim attached).
